final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a young woman in a denim jacket leaning against a neon sign on a 1990s Hong Kong street at night.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, vintage Hong Kong cinema aesthetic, visible film grain and halation, Wong Kar-wai inspired mood
Composition: medium shot at eye level, 50mm lens, subject positioned off-center with neon sign as backdrop element
Subject: young woman in oversized denim jacket, relaxed leaning pose, hair catching ambient light, contemplative expression
Scene/backdrop: 1990s Hong Kong street at night, blurred storefronts and signage in background, humid atmosphere
Lighting/mood: mixed neon glow (red/pink/green) from signage, soft ambient street light, hazy night atmosphere, nostalgic and melancholic
Color palette: warm amber and orange tones as base, neon pink/red/green accents, lifted shadows with film color cast
Materials/textures: visible 35mm film grain, soft halation around light sources, slightly desaturated colors with warm push
Avoid: digital sharpness, modern LED signage, oversaturated colors, clean studio lighting, 8K stuffer aesthetic
